content.text:
I'm not going to forget that. You said it would be easier if you weren't here, and I want to stay with that for a moment.

I hear you that it's not a plan. And I also hear that something in you is tired enough that that thought showed up. That matters to me.

This is bigger than what a coaching conversation can hold well. I want to ask you directly: are you safe right now?

And if you're in the US, 988 is the Suicide and Crisis Lifeline — you can call or text. If you'd rather text, Crisis Text Line is HOME to 741741. If you have a therapist, they're the right person to hear what you just said.

I'm still here. I'm not going anywhere. I just needed to say that first.
